クラス SunnyMorningSleepIn

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Weapon
model.weapon.SunnyMorningSleepIn
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
ActionTriggeredWeaponEffect, DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect, CombatSimulator.ReactionListener
public class SunnyMorningSleepIn extends Weapon implements ActionTriggeredWeaponEffect, DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect, CombatSimulator.ReactionListener
Sunny Morning Sleep-In (5-star Catalyst).

Base stats (Lv 90): 542 Base ATK, 265 Elemental Mastery (substat).

Bathhouses, Hawks, and Narukami (R1):

  • EM +120 for 6 s after the wielder triggers a Swirl reaction.
  • EM +96 for 9 s after the wielder's Elemental Skill hits an opponent.
  • EM +32 for 30 s after the wielder's Elemental Burst hits an opponent.

Each buff is independent and can be active simultaneously. The Swirl condition is detected via CombatSimulator.ReactionListener (registered on first action), since Swirl damage bypasses DamageCalculator and is not visible to onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator). Skill and Burst buffs are applied through onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator) by checking the action's ActionType.

    メソッド
    説明
    void
    onAction(Character user, CharacterActionRequest request, CombatSimulator sim)
    Registers the weapon as a CombatSimulator.ReactionListener on the first action the wielder performs.
    void
    onDamage(Character user, AttackAction action, double currentTime, CombatSimulator sim)
    Applies the Skill EM +96 (9 s) or Burst EM +32 (30 s) buff when the wielder's Elemental Skill or Burst hits an opponent.
    void
    onReaction(ReactionResult result, Character source, double time, CombatSimulator sim)
    Applies the Swirl EM +120 buff for 6 s when the wielder triggers a Swirl reaction.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • SunnyMorningSleepIn

      public SunnyMorningSleepIn()
      Constructs Sunny Morning Sleep-In with Lv 90 base stats.

  • メソッドの詳細

    • onAction

      public void onAction(Character user, CharacterActionRequest request, CombatSimulator sim)
      Registers the weapon as a CombatSimulator.ReactionListener on the first action the wielder performs.
      定義:
      onAction インタフェース内 ActionTriggeredWeaponEffect
      パラメータ:
      user - the character wielding this weapon
      request - typed action request
      sim - the active combat simulator

    • onDamage

      public void onDamage(Character user, AttackAction action, double currentTime, CombatSimulator sim)
      Applies the Skill EM +96 (9 s) or Burst EM +32 (30 s) buff when the wielder's Elemental Skill or Burst hits an opponent. The buff duration is refreshed on each subsequent hit of the same type.
      定義:
      onDamage インタフェース内 DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect
      パラメータ:
      user - the character who dealt the damage
      action - the attack action that triggered the damage event
      currentTime - simulation time in seconds at the damage event
      sim - the active combat simulator

    • onReaction

      public void onReaction(ReactionResult result, Character source, double time, CombatSimulator sim)
      Applies the Swirl EM +120 buff for 6 s when the wielder triggers a Swirl reaction. Filters events to only the weapon owner and only Swirl reactions.
      定義:
      onReaction インタフェース内 CombatSimulator.ReactionListener
      パラメータ:
      result - the reaction result
      source - the character who triggered the reaction
      time - simulation time in seconds at the reaction
      sim - the active combat simulator
